allow: Bash(# Stop any existing mongo container docker stop primo-mongo docker rm primo-mongo # Start fresh MongoDB container docker run -d \\ --name primo-mongo \\ -p 27017:27017 \\ -e MONGO_INITDB_ROOT_USERNAME=admin \\ -e MONGO_INITDB_ROOT_PASSWORD=admin123 \\ mongo:7 echo ""Waiting for MongoDB to start..."" sleep 5 # Check if running docker ps)
